## Checklist

- [ ] I ran `python3 -m py_compile restore_sql_fast.py`.
- [ ] I ran `python3 -m unittest discover -s tests -v`.
- [ ] I did not introduce third-party runtime dependencies.
- [ ] I kept Python 3.6.8 compatibility in mind.
- [ ] I updated README or examples if the command-line behavior changed.
- [ ] I removed real RDS backup URLs, passwords, IP addresses, and business-sensitive data from logs or test fixtures.
